title: init_db() runs as an import side effect
evidence: app.py:164 calls init_db() at module top level, creating books.db on the filesystem whenever app is imported (including under test before the fixture swaps DATABASE)
suggestion: Guard DB init behind __main__ or an app factory so importing the module has no filesystem side effect

title: ?author= uses substring LIKE match, not exact match
evidence: app.py:92 SELECT ... WHERE author LIKE '%<value>%' — matches any substring; spec only says 'filter by author'
suggestion: Acceptable per spec; document the substring semantics or offer exact match if desired

title: code_quality score 0.79, idiomatic 0.76
evidence: scores.json: code_quality=0.7888, idiomatic=0.76 — moderate quality signal, no blocking lint failures
suggestion: No action required; below-1.0 quality reflects minor style/idiom deductions, not defects
